name: icc-donor-intel
description: ICC Donor Intelligence — CRM and AI research platform

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix client install && npm --prefix server install
scripts.postinstall: npm --prefix client install && npm --prefix server install
scripts.build: npm run prisma:generate && npm run build:client
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
